# growthbook_custom_field (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook custom field by ID (its unique key).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique key of the custom field.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the field is active.
- `creator` (String) User ID of the creator.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `default_value` (String) JSON-encoded default value.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `placeholder` (String) Placeholder text.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this field applies to.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether a value is required.
- `sections` (List of String) Object types this field applies to.
- `type` (String) Value type.
- `values` (String) Comma-separated allowed values.
